title: triodia epactia
intro: Triodia epactia, also known as Kudjero or Blue Grass, is a type of grass native to the Australian outback. It has been traditionally used by Indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Triodia epactia can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused in hot water to create a soothing and medicinal drink.
